functions.name: getRoleNames
params:
{
  enableRGRoles,
  enableIotRoles,
  enableVaultRoles,
  enableAksRoles,
  enableStorageRoles,
  enableACRRoles,
  enableAppConfig,
  enableServiceBus,
  enableSignalR,
  enableRedisCache,
  enableContainerAppRoles,
}

functions.name: getRoleName
params:
{
  env = currentEnv,
  location,
  appName,
  moduleName,
  roleName,
}

functions.name: roleAssignment
params:
{
  name,
  roleName,
  scope = defaultSubScope,
  principalId,
  principalType,
  dependsOn,
}

functions.name: createSelfSignCertWithCA
params:
{
  dnsName,
  commonName,
  organization,
  allowedUses = defaultAllowedUses,
  validYears = 3,
  vaultInfo,
}

functions.name: createSelfSignCert
params:
{
  dnsName,
  commonName,
  organization,
  allowedUses = defaultAllowedUses,
  validYears = 3,
  vaultInfo,
}

functions.name: randomLogin
params:
{
  name,
  loginPrefix,
  maxUserNameLength,
  passwordOptions = { policy: 'yearly' },
  vaultInfo,
}

functions.name: createDiagnostic
params:
{
    logs,
    metrics,
    resourceUri,
    storageAccountId,
    workspaceId,
    dependsOn,
  }

functions.name: createElasticPool
Storage
params:
{
  name,
  group,
  vaultInfo,
  enableEncryption,
  envRoles,
  envUIDInfo,
  containers = [],
  queues = [],
  fileShares = [],
  network,
  features = {},
  policies = { keyExpirationPeriodInDays: 365 },
  lock = true,
  dependsOn,
  ignoreChanges = [],
}

functions.name: create
params:
{
  name,
  group,
  snat,
  policy,
  outbound,
  management,
  logInfo,
  enableDnsProxy,
  autoScale,
  sku = {
    name: network.AzureFirewallSkuName.AZFW_VNet,
    tier: network.AzureFirewallSkuTier.Basic,
  },
  dependsOn,
  ignoreChanges,
}

functions.name: create
params:
{
  name,
  group,
  version = network.IPVersion.IPv4,
  publicIPPrefix,
  enableDdos,
  ddosCustomPolicyId,
  enableZone = isPrd,
  allocationMethod = network.IPAllocationMethod.Static,
  tier = network.PublicIPAddressSkuTier.Regional,
  lock = isPrd,
  dependsOn,
}

functions.name: create
params:
{
  nameIncludeDns,
  resourceInfo,
  subnetIds,
  extraVnetIds,
  privateDnsZoneName,
  linkServiceGroupIds,
  privateIpAddress,
  dependsOn,
}
